mapper.select: select template_id, template_name, owner_type, owner_id, bg_image, layout_json, audit_status, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, del_flag from jst_cert_template where template_id = #{templateId} and del_flag = '0' limit 1

select template_id as templateId, template_name as templateName, owner_type as ownerType, owner_id as ownerId, bg_image as bgImage, layout_json as layoutJson, audit_status as auditStatus, status as status, create_time as createTime from jst_cert_template where del_flag = '0' and status = 1 and ( (owner_type = 'partner' and owner_id = #{partnerId}) or (owner_type = 'platform' and audit_status = 'approved') ) order by create_time desc, template_id desc

select cert_id, cert_no, contest_id, score_id, enroll_id, user_id, participant_id, template_id, cert_file_url, issue_status, issue_time, void_reason, verify_code, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, del_flag from jst_cert_record where cert_id = #{certId} and del_flag = '0' limit 1

select cr.cert_id as certId, cr.cert_no as certNo, cr.contest_id as contestId, c.contest_name as contestName, cr.score_id as scoreId, cr.enroll_id as enrollId, er.enroll_no as enrollNo, cr.user_id as userId, cr.participant_id as participantId, p.name as participantName, p.guardian_mobile as guardianMobileMasked, cr.template_id as templateId, t.template_name as templateName, cr.cert_file_url as certFileUrl, cr.issue_status as issueStatus, cr.issue_time as issueTime, cr.verify_code as verifyCode, s.award_level as awardLevel from jst_cert_record cr left join jst_contest c on c.contest_id = cr.contest_id and c.del_flag = '0' left join jst_score_record s on s.score_id = cr.score_id and s.del_flag = '0' left join jst_enroll_record er on er.enroll_id = cr.enroll_id and er.del_flag = '0' left join jst_participant p on p.participant_id = cr.participant_id and p.del_flag = '0' left join jst_cert_template t on t.template_id = cr.template_id and t.del_flag = '0' where cr.cert_id = #{certId} and cr.del_flag = '0' limit 1

select s.score_id as scoreId, s.contest_id as contestId, s.enroll_id as enrollId, s.user_id as userId, s.participant_id as participantId, s.score_value as scoreValue, s.award_level as awardLevel, p.name as participantName, c.contest_name as contestName from jst_score_record s left join jst_participant p on p.participant_id = s.participant_id and p.del_flag = '0' left join jst_contest c on c.contest_id = s.contest_id and c.del_flag = '0' where s.contest_id = #{contestId} and s.audit_status = 'approved' and s.publish_status = 'published' and s.del_flag = '0'
and s.score_id in
#{scoreId}
order by s.score_id asc
select count(1) from jst_cert_record where score_id = #{scoreId} and issue_status != 'voided' and del_flag = '0'
select count(1) from jst_cert_record where enroll_id = #{enrollId} and issue_status != 'voided' and del_flag = '0'

select er.enroll_id AS enrollId, er.contest_id AS contestId, er.user_id AS userId, er.participant_id AS participantId, sr.score_id AS scoreId from jst_enroll_record er left join jst_score_record sr on sr.enroll_id = er.enroll_id and sr.del_flag = '0' where er.contest_id = #{contestId} and er.audit_status = 'approved' and er.del_flag = '0' and er.enroll_id in
#{id}
